Full Graph: MATCH (a)-[r]->(b) RETURN a, r, b LIMIT 200
Rahul's Care Team: MATCH (m:Member {name:'Rahul Kapoor'})-[r]->(p) WHERE p:Therapist OR p:Psychiatrist OR p:CareCoordinator OR p:FamilyMember RETURN m, r, p
Rahul's Symptoms: MATCH (m:Member {name:'Rahul Kapoor'})-[r:EXHIBITS]->(s:Symptom) RETURN m, r, s
Assessment Scores: MATCH (m:Member {name:'Rahul Kapoor'})-[r:ASSESSED_WITH]->(a:Assessment) OPTIONAL MATCH (a)-[c:COMPARED_TO]->(a2:Assessment) RETURN m, r, a, c, a2
Journal & Mood: MATCH (m:Member {name:'Rahul Kapoor'})-[r]->(j) WHERE j:JournalEntry OR j:MoodLog OPTIONAL MATCH (j)-[r2]->(t) RETURN m, r, j, r2, t
